title: ICF | CLX Cat & Dog Wipes | Antibacterial & Antifungal Cleansing Wipes for Paws, Skin Folds & Ears | Supports Healthy Skin & Odor Control | 40 Count
features: HELPS CLEAN PAWS, EARS & SKIN FOLDS - Convenient pre-moistened wipes help remove dirt and debris from sensitive areas like paws, skin folds, and ears—keeping your pet fresh and comfortable between baths.

ANTIBACTERIAL & ANTIFUNGAL CLEANSING ACTION - Formulated with Chlorhexidine and Climbazole to gently cleanse and support the skin’s natural barrier. Great for maintaining clean, healthy skin on dogs, cats, and horses.
GENTLE ON SENSITIVE SKIN - Infused with Zinc Gluconate and Glycerin to help soothe and moisturize delicate areas. Alcohol-free and designed for pets with sensitive skin.
EASY TO USE AT HOME OR ON THE GO - Perfect for quick cleanups after walks, playtime, or outdoor adventures. Wipe away dirt and unwanted odors without the need for water or rinsing.
THICK, DURABLE & PET-PARENT APPROVED - Each thick, durable wipe is designed to handle tough cleaning jobs while remaining gentle on your pet’s skin. Paraben-free and pH-balanced for pets.

You can use CLX Wipes daily or whenever needed to help keep your pet's skin clean and maintain its health. Can you use it on puppies? Yes, you can use it on puppies and kittens. How do you use the wipes? Remove a large wipe from the package. Cut in half if necessary. Use against the hair growth. Do not rinse. Use once daily or as often as necessary. Snap the lid top closed to avoid the wipes from drying. Can it help with itchy skin? Yes, CLX Wipes can help soothe irritated skin and reduce discomfort, promoting a more comfortable experience for your pet. How long does it take to work? CLX Wipes effectively remove grease and dirt from your pet's skin with just one wipe. Incorporate them into your routine for ongoing maintenance, ensuring your pet's skin remains healthy and clean.
